basic_details.job_title: DLSA Ujjain Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Ujjain (DLSA Ujjain)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Ujjain (DLSA Ujjain) Vehicle Driver Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website ujjain.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Ujjain Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: Not specified

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, Valid 4-wheeler Driving License, Experience in driving 4-wheeler vehicle
qualification.details: Minimum 10th pass from a recognized institution. Valid four-wheeler driving license. Experience of driving a four-wheeler vehicle.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Ujjain Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ujjain.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
